description: All selector values in the family are contained in the role-pair endpoint set.
The union of selector values equals the role-pair endpoint set.
Every member selector value set is a subset of the family endpoint set.
The role-pair tokens form a tree.
The role-pair tokens form a simple path.
All members are razor-small and blocked as razor-small until proven.
Endpoint equality, selector subset condition, and role tree all hold.
